sys_script_client.description:
Execute this onChange function when Request Type changes for table Request
2.8 | 2022-04-18 | mmcc | STRY0119470 - All Tasker users (even GHA and TAA) access to use organization requests (button currently hidden from GHA and TAA Set u_response_comments to mandatory when Task Status is In progress and the task is not in a new record state
Unknown release STRY0108290 - DIA- Org Hierarchy– OU Request Form- Request Comments Prefill
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - OU Request - Member Add - Comment Tasker - OU Request - Member Remove - Comment Tasker - OU Request - Member Update - Comment Tasker - OU Request - Sub OU Add - Comment Tasker - OU Request - Sub OU Remove - Comment Tasker - OU Request - OU Update - Comment Tasker - OU Request - OU Remove - Comment Tasker - Confirm Change of OU Request Type Tasker - Confirm Change of OU Request Type
sys_script_client.name: Request OU - onChange Request Type
